text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Another message... Must Mother be so persistent?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What does she mean she's "worried"? Are all
these messages "for my own good" too?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Can't she just tell me she's proud of me and
leave it at that?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?! When did you get here?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, forget everything you just saw! Right this
instant!
